experiences.title: Picnic for hikers
experiences.description: Picnic bags, seasonal fruit, sandwiches on wood-fired bread from Zambujeira do Mar — everything you need for your hike.
experiences.imageAlt: Picnic basket with local products in the countryside

experiences.title: Cheese, charcuterie and wine board
experiences.description: To savour on your room's terrace, at your own pace.
experiences.imageAlt: Board of regional cheese, charcuterie and wine

experiences.title: Walking the Rota Vicentina
experiences.description: The Fishermen's Trail is minutes from the monte. The stretch between Zambujeira do Mar and Cavaleiro is considered one of the most beautiful of the Rota Vicentina.
experiences.imageAlt: Hiker on the Rota Vicentina with Atlantic Ocean views

experiences.title: Cycling Trails
experiences.description: Explore the montado paths and the parts of Alentejo where cars don't reach. By bicycle, at your own pace.
experiences.imageAlt: Bicycle leaning against a tree with Alentejo montado in the background

experiences.title: Cabo Sardão Lighthouse
experiences.description: This emblematic early-19th-century building stands out for its singular architecture and for offering breathtaking views at sunset.

experiences.title: Herdade do Touril Restaurant
experiences.description: Lunch, petiscos and dinners — the best of the region's gastronomy, breathtaking scenery, and special attention to our guests.

beaches.name: Tonel
beaches.description: The beach of Sagres. Strong wind, impossible color, the end of the European world.
beaches.imageAlt: Praia do Tonel in Sagres with fortress in the background

beaches.name: Zambujeira do Mar
beaches.description: Wild beach nestled in schist cliffs. Pure Atlantic.
beaches.imageAlt: Zambujeira do Mar with cliffs and turquoise-blue Atlantic sea

beaches.name: Alteirinhos
beaches.description: Beach with difficult access and unlikely beauty. For those seeking the unexpected.
beaches.imageAlt: Praia dos Alteirinhos viewed from the top of the cliffs

beaches.name: Carvalhal
beaches.description: Long and windy, a favorite among surfers and those seeking beach without crowds.
beaches.imageAlt: Praia do Carvalhal with waves and dunes in the background

beaches.name: Almograve
beaches.description: Wild beach with easy access and crystal-clear waters. A hidden treasure of the Costa Vicentina.
beaches.imageAlt: Praia de Almograve with golden sands

beaches.name: Odeceixe
beaches.description: Where the river meets the sea. Sheltered from the wind, ideal for families.
beaches.imageAlt: Praia de Odeceixe with the Seixe river estuary

beaches.name: Malhão
beaches.description: Beach with wide sandy expanse. Dunes, wind, and open Atlantic.

beaches.name: Aivados
beaches.description: Secret beach between rocks. One of the best-kept secrets of the coast.

attractions.title: São Teotónio
attractions.description: The nearest village. Weekly market on Fridays, bakery, butcher, and local grocery.

attractions.title: Zambujeira do Mar
attractions.description: The nearest and one of the most beautiful. Schist cliffs and open Atlantic.

attractions.title: Odemira
attractions.description: Riverside town with market, restaurants, and services. On the banks of the Mira River.

attractions.title: Aljezur
attractions.description: Moorish town with castle and crafts market. Gateway to the Algarve's Costa Vicentina.

attractions.title: Vila Nova de Milfontes
attractions.description: Charming coastal town on the banks of the Mira River. With wild beaches, restaurants, and nightlife.

attractions.title: Almograve
attractions.description: Wild beach with easy access and crystal-clear waters. A hidden treasure of the Costa Vicentina.

attractions.title: Malhão
attractions.description: Beach with wide sandy expanse. Dunes, wind, and open Atlantic.

attractions.title: Aivados
attractions.description: Secret beach between rocks. One of the best-kept secrets of the coast.
